reasoning: XLK -0.41% + XLF -0.39% both negative while XLE +1.12% = classic risk-off rotation with energy as the sole winner. Tech weakness (SPY's largest component at ~30% weighting) combined with financials weakness (-0.39%) is a negative breadth signal. Energy strength does not offset the drag from tech/financials leadership absence. SPY premarket at -0.29% reflects this underlying weakness. Bearish bias with medium confidence — sector internals show selective defensive rotation, not broad-based strength.
key_observations: XLK -0.41%: Tech weakness (largest SPY sector) is the primary drag
XLF -0.39%: Financial weakness compounds the negative breadth picture
XLE +1.12%: Energy rallying but insufficient to offset tech/fin losses — indicates defensive rotation, not broad bullish leadership
Overall rotation: Clear risk-off with energy as defensive proxy; no risk-on support from growth/financials
